race.comment: STRAAND BEAUTY (3) finally capitalised on a string of narrow defeats when putting it all together at Warwick Farm. He draws to advantage again and with fresh legs after 37 days, can keep the momentum rolling. SARATOGA POWER (4) warmed into it nicely late behind DUROVA here fresh. He gets a key booking in Nock and steps out to a pet trip. With a 2kg swing on the winner, he can absolutely turn the tables. DUROVA (2) returned with a bang here last start, stalking the speed and putting them away with authority. She'll only improve second-up and is a three-time winner over this trip. The draw is the query but she's hard to ignore. PLAY MY SONG (5) also comes through the DUROVA race, where she was well below her best. From an inside draw she can improve sharply.
